game_title: Super Sean 007: Legend of the Seven Gems
status: Full free-to-play game: 15-chapter campaign plus open-ended homestead building endgame.

party_skills.Dave: Gadget Zap — damage plus a one-turn stun
party_skills.Petroman: Iron Guard — halves damage taken for two turns
party_skills.Haraku: Moon Blessing — heals 35% of max HP

villain.name: Xelar the Bald Wizard
villain.summary: A cosmic sorcerer trying to drain the Seven Gems and conquer the known universe from the Bald Moon Tower.

campaign.monster_types: 20+ regional variants of slimes, mushrooms, bats and crystal creatures

building_and_crafting.gathering: Respawning nodes: trees, boulders, mushrooms, berry hedges, crystal clusters, ore veins, machine scrap, moon herbs, ancient relics.
building_and_crafting.crafting: 19 recipes covering materials, healing food, seeds and 8 equippable items across weapon, armor and charm slots.
building_and_crafting.homestead: Claim a base, build from 41 tile pieces or stamp blueprints (Cozy Cottage, Stone Keep castle, Garden Patch, Orchard, Star Shrine), expand the claim across 4 levels; removing pieces refunds all materials.
building_and_crafting.gardening: Berry, flower and moonfruit crops grow in real time, even while offline.

gameplay_summary: Top-down exploration across nine regions, NPC dialogue, quests, treasure chests, turn-based party battles, XP and levels, friendship burst meter, resource gathering, crafting, gardening and tile-based base building. Progress saves locally in the browser.
monetization_model: Free-to-play, ad-supported browser game with Adsterra placements plus optional in-game rewarded ads.

how_to_play.movement: WASD or Arrow keys, or the mobile touch D-pad.
how_to_play.interact_and_harvest: Press E (or tap Interact) near NPCs, chests, portals and resource nodes; nodes take multiple hits.
how_to_play.crafting: Press C anywhere; advanced recipes need homestead stations.
how_to_play.building: Press B at the claimed homestead; V opens blueprints; right-click or X removes pieces with a full refund.
how_to_play.menus: I bag and equipment, Q quests and gems, M world map, P save.
how_to_play.battle: Click/tap commands or press number keys 1-9.
how_to_play.audio: O toggles music, L toggles SFX.
